title: alyssum ochroleucum
intro: Alyssum ochroleucum, also known as White Alyssum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Alyssum ochroleucum is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving stress, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
